records.ety: [F. amiti, OF. amisti, amist, fr. an assumed LL. amisitas, fr. L. amicus friendly, from amare to love. See Amiable.]

defs: Friendship, in a general sense, between individuals, societies, or nations; friendly relations; good understanding; as, a treaty of amity and commerce; the amity of the Whigs and Tories.
quotes: To live on terms of amity with vice.
